student_app.description: High energy, vibrant, Gen Z focused. Uses bold colors, pastel backgrounds, and stark black borders for a trendy, accessible feel.

outlet_dashboard.description: Functional, distraction-free Kanban board. Prioritizes legibility, large touch targets, and clear status indicators.

admin_analytics.archetype: Dark Mode Analytics (similar to Jewel & Luxury but tech-focused)
admin_analytics.description: Deep charcoal background, glassmorphism cards, and electric blue/neon accents for data visualization clarity.

student_app.rationale: Outfit provides geometric friendliness, while Nunito's rounded shapes enhance the 'Vibrant Play' aesthetic.

dashboards.rationale: Chivo is commanding for data and admin panels. IBM Plex Sans provides high legibility for dense kanban boards and analytics.

student_app.grid: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris) for food court browsing. Asymmetrical layout mixing spans.
student_app.spacing: p-6 to p-8 inside cards. gap-6 to gap-8 between sections.

outlet_dashboard.grid: CSS Grid for Kanban: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4. h-screen overflow-hidden.
outlet_dashboard.cards: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border, no heavy shadow. sharp edges (rounded-md).

admin_analytics.grid: Mode B: Control Room Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
admin_analytics.cards: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl, border-white/10, soft ambient shadow.

components_strategy.ui_library: Shadcn UI heavily customized via Tailwind

student_features.voice_command: Persistent floating mic button. Uses framer-motion for pulsing animation (ring-4 ring-primary/50) and waveform visualizer during active listening.
student_features.smart_cart: Sticky bottom bar on mobile, floating side panel on desktop. Smooth layout transitions using framer-motion. Uses Sonner for confetti/success toast on checkout.
student_features.live_tracking: Custom SVG campus map. Animate a map pin along SVG path. Timeline uses vertical border-l-2 with pulsing dots for active state.
student_features.food_modals: Shadcn Dialog. Mobile-first (max-h-[80vh] overflow-y-auto). Contains embedded video placeholder (aspect-video bg-muted) and grid for nutrition facts.

outlet_features.kanban_board: Drag-and-drop functionality (react-beautiful-dnd or dnd-kit). Visual flash alert (CSS keyframe flash-green) and audio chime (HTML5 Audio) on new order.
outlet_features.cards: Include large typography for timer (elapsed time) and clear status toggles.

admin_features.analytics: Shadcn Charts / Recharts. Dark mode styling with grid lines at opacity 0.1. Tooltips must have dark glassmorphism background.

components_strategy.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='voice-command-btn', data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').

media_and_images.usage_rules: Main agent MUST use these exact URLs. No placeholders allowed. Preserve aspect ratios with object-cover.

campus_students.description: Campus overview hero for landing page

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Implement three distinct layouts based on the active role (Student, Outlet, Admin). Use Next.js layout patterns or conditional rendering at the root app shell.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: For the Student app, strictly follow the Neo-brutalist styling: hard black borders (border-2 border-black), solid shadows, pastel backgrounds, and rounded corners.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: For the Outlet Kanban, prioritize dense information display. Do not use rounded cards or heavy shadows. Use distinct colors for order status tags.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: For Admin Analytics, implement a dark mode theme. Use glassmorphism for cards (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5).
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Integrate Web Speech API for the voice command button. It must be visually prominent and animated when active.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Live tracking requires a custom SVG map component. Create an SVG representing the campus and map order progress along its paths.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels image URLs for all food, store, and student references. DO NOT USE placeholder text or generic grey boxes.
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Add data-testid to all buttons, links, inputs, and major containers.
